name: Fifth District Bancorp, Inc.
business: Fifth District Bancorp, Inc. is a savings and loan holding company that operates through its wholly owned subsidiary, Fifth District Savings Bank, a federally-chartered savings bank. The bank originates primarily fixed-rate one-to-four-family residential mortgage loans and offers a variety of deposit accounts. Its primary market area is the New Orleans-Metairie Metropolitan Statistical Area.

exposures.sentence: Our loan portfolio consists primarily of fixed-rate one-to four-family residential mortgage loans.
We also face competition for loans from mortgage banking firms, consumer finance companies, credit unions, and fintech companies
a failure or breach of our operational or information security systems or infrastructure, including cyberattacks
